name: Indiv Usa
message: NDIV was founded in 1964 and since then it has been a leading export company, supplying customers in Central America, South America, the Caribbean and Asia. INDIV, whose headquarters is located in Springfield, Missouri, USA, has production facilities in USA, Argentina and Mexico, and regional sales offices in Colombia, Malaysia, Malaysia and Venezuela, along with distributors in various other countries. INDIV develops, manufactures and distributes complete poultry raising systems as well helps to analyze the different technical - economical alternatives and or layout according to various investment options.
